issue: Grammar data checks do not validate nawatRouteProfiles.

issue: Renderer injects patientivo branch/conversion around non-agentive stem parts.

issue: routeMode and routeTenseValue are route contracts.

issue: Adjective/adverb inventories are hard-coded in runtime constants.

issue: Patientivo adjective outputs use special derivation behavior and do not fully match generic noun patientivo suffix controls.
